title: Public Notice Decision to Issue a Negotiated Placer Mineral Lease – Ester & Willow Creek
summary: MHT 9400902 Notice is hereby given that, pursuant to the provisions of AS 38.05.801 and 11 AAC 99, the Executive Director of the Alaska Mental Health Trust Land Office (TLO) has determined that it is in the best interest of the Alaska Mental Health Trust and its beneficiaries to complete a Lease, Non-Competitive Mineral...
